issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`

issue.message: The locale folder "`he`" should be called "`iw`" instead; see the `java.util.Locale` documentation
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of com.android.tools.build:gradle than 8.13.2 is available: 9.1.0
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.16.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-stdlib than 2.1.20 is available: 2.2.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.9.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-fragment-ktx than 2.9.0 is available: 2.9.7
A newer version of androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx than 2.10.1 is available: 2.11.2
Use `AppCompatResources.getDrawable()`
Use `AppCompatResources.getDrawable()`

"add_an_app" is not translated in "de" (German), "sv" (Swedish), "in" (Indonesian), "hr" (Croatian), "it" (Italian), "fr" (French), "hu" (Hungarian), "zh" (Chinese), "ar" (Arabic), "uk" (Ukrainian), "ja" (Japanese), "pl" (Polish), "he" (Hebrew), "nl" (Dutch), "tr" (Turkish)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="pro_message">A Subconsciously-nek van egy pro verziója is, amely Pro Launcher néven ismert. További funkciókat kínál, mint például időjárás, widgetek, betűtípusok, mappák, AMOLED háttérképek stb.

issue.message: The language `ar (Arabic)` is present in this project, but not declared in the `localeConfig` resource

The intent action `android.intent.action.MAIN (used to start an activity)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported component `app.olauncher.helper.FakeHomeActivity` from a manifest. If you are trying to invoke this specific component via the action then you should make the intent explicit by calling `Intent.set{Component,Class,ClassName}`.

The intent action `android.intent.action.MAIN (used to start an activity)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported component `app.olauncher.helper.FakeHomeActivity` from a manifest. If you are trying to invoke this specific component via the action then you should make the intent explicit by calling `Intent.set{Component,Class,ClassName}`.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
This `<FrameLayout>` can be replaced with a `<merge>` tag
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance

issue.message: Custom view ``LinearLayout`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
`ViewSwipeTouchListener#onTouch` should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
